title: sticherus ciliatus
intro: Sticherus ciliatus, also known as the club fern or ciliate club fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. Herbal preparations of Sticherus ciliatus can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
